в—Џ Now signal done:

в—Џ Signal completion (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget && npx
  в”‚ storyboard agent signal --status done --message "Replaced hidden CropPanel with
  в”‚ floating bar. Dark translucent bar hovers above crop region, follows handles, flips
  в”‚ below when near top. Added Escape key to cancel. Save/Undo/Cancel buttons always
  в”‚ visible."
  в”” 3 lines...

в—Џ Done. Here's what I changed:

  Problem: The old CropPanel was positioned top: 100% below the frame, but parent
  overflow: hidden clipped it вЂ” making it invisible and trapping users in crop mode.

  Fix:

   - Replaced the panel with a floating bar (dark translucent + backdrop-blur) that
  hovers above the crop region
   - Bar follows the crop selection as you drag handles
   - Flips below when near the top edge
   - Added Escape key to cancel crop mode
   - Buttons: вњ“ Save (green), в†© Undo, вњ• Cancel + live dimensions

 ~/workspace/st... [вЋ‡ 4.3.0--prompt-widget*%]
